channel.title: Projects on Myour - One Page Resume CV Hugo Theme
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Myour - One Page Resume CV Hugo Theme

item.title: 2022 Summer Teaching at Jinxi, Longquan
item.description: In the summer of 2022, as a member of the Melton Foundation, I participated in a teaching support activity at Jinxing Town Central Primary School in Longquan, Lishui.

item.title: 2023 GCC in Chile!
item.description: In October 2023, as a fellow of Melton ZU, I went to Temuco, Chile, to participate in GCC 2023! I also spent a lovely two weeks in Chile.
